Localization.Description: An attacker can change logging parameters to hide their activity and firewall rules to advance through the network

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} changed logging parameters on host {event_src.host}. This can lead to loss of some information about the next activity on the host.
User {subject.account.name} changed the firewall rule set on host {event_src.host}. This can lead to new attack vectors.
